description.value: The creature can regenerate damage at an extraordinary rate. At the start of each of its turns, the creature regains X Wounds. It cannot regenerate Wounds lost from fire, Holy damage, or Critical Effects. If the creature is killed (reaches 0 Wounds and fails the appropriate Critical Effect), it stops regenerating. X represents the number of Wounds regenerated per round.

system.benefit: At the start of each turn, the creature regains X Wounds. Cannot regenerate damage from fire, Holy damage, or Critical Effects. X is the regeneration rate.
